title: Experiment
description: Experiment schema from Amplitude Experiment Management API

id.description: The unique identifier for the experiment.

projectId.description: The project ID the experiment belongs to.

key.description: The unique key used to reference the experiment in code.

name.description: The display name of the experiment.

description.description: A description of the experiment's purpose.

evaluationMode.description: The evaluation mode, either local or remote.

variants.description: Array of variant configurations including control and treatment groups.

key.description: The unique key for the variant.

name.description: The display name of the variant.

payload.description: An optional JSON payload associated with the variant.

description.description: A description of what this variant does.

rolloutWeight.description: The rollout weight as a percentage (0-100) controlling traffic allocation to this variant.

name.description: The display name of the segment.

conditions.description: Array of targeting conditions that define this segment.

variant.description: The variant key to assign when this segment matches.

percentage.description: The percentage of matching users to include (0-100).

state.description: The current state of the experiment.

rolledOutVariant.description: The variant key that was rolled out, if the experiment has concluded.

startDate.description: The date and time the experiment started running.

endDate.description: The date and time the experiment stopped running.
